properties.name: South Uist
properties.notes: First test launch in 1959. First space launch from the UK took place here in October 2015 as part of 'At Sea Demonstration 15' of an American 'Terrier-Orion' sounding rocket.[46]

properties.notes: National Research Council Canada

properties.name: Clark University Physics Laboratory, Worcester, Massachusetts
properties.notes: Robert H. Goddard's first experimental rockets, starting with powder-based fuels. Was also site of liquid rocket engine tests before being launched in nearby Auburn.

properties.name: Goddard Test Site, Auburn, Massachusetts
properties.notes: Open field chosen as rocket test site in 1925; launch site of Robert H. Goddard's first liquid fuel rockets beginning on 16 March 1926.:143

properties.name: Eden Valley Test Site, Roswell, New Mexico
properties.notes: Used for Goddard's later rocket tests.

properties.name: Wallops Flight Facility, Delmarva Peninsula, Virginia
properties.notes: Now operated by NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center.

properties.name: White Sands Missile Range, New Mexico
properties.notes: Military and civilian flights. Served as alternate landing site for the Space Shuttle.

properties.name: Nevada Test and Training Range (formerly Nellis Air Force Range)
Poker Flat Research Range, Alaska
properties.notes: Sounding rocket launch site

properties.name: Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, Florida
properties.notes: Commercial and U.S. Government uncrewed missions. Adjacent to NASA KSC.

properties.name: Vandenberg Space Force Base, California
properties.notes: Satellites, ballistic missile tests. Government and commercial launches. Also launches SpaceX rockets.

properties.name: Kennedy Space Center, Florida
properties.notes: Launched each NASA crewed mission. Adjacent to Cape Canaveral Space Force Station.

properties.name: Pacific Missile Range Facility, Hawaii
properties.notes: Used for testing of antiballistic missile and missile tracking by the US Navy.

properties.name: Keweenaw, Michigan
properties.notes: Sounding rocket launch site. Currently inactive.

properties.name: Pacific Spaceport Complex, Kodiak, Alaska
properties.notes: Ballistic missile interceptor tests, satellite launches. Alaska Aerospace Corporation.

properties.name: Mid-Atlantic Regional Spaceport (MARS), Delmarva Peninsula, Virginia
properties.notes: Operates in partnership with NASA, adjacent to Wallops Flight Facility. Designed for both commercial and government launches. In 2019, Rocket Lab built their first US launch facility here.

properties.name: Mojave Air and Space Port, California
properties.notes: Adjacent to Edwards AFB. Privately funded, horizontal-launch spaceport. Xoie, Xombie, Xodiac (Masten Space Systems); SpaceShipOne, SpaceShipTwo (Scaled Composites, Virgin Galactic); Launcher One (Virgin Orbit).

properties.name: Spaceport America, Upham, New Mexico
properties.notes: Sub-orbital commercial and planned space tourist launches. Operated by the state of New Mexico with Virgin Galactic as the anchor tenant. Adjacent to White Sands Missile Range.

properties.name: Corn Ranch, Van Horn, Texas
properties.notes: Used by Blue Origin for suborbital launches and engine tests.

properties.name: Spaceport Camden, Camden County, Georgia
properties.notes: Originally Thiokol rocket testing facility. Used by Vector Space for testing and launching. Project and site abandoned in 2023 due to local pushback and financial issues.

properties.name: SpaceX Starbase Spaceport, Starbase, Texas
properties.notes: Site originally planned for Falcon rockets, now used exclusively by SpaceX for Starship/SuperHeavy testing and launching.

properties.name: Maine Spaceport Complex, Washington County, Maine
properties.notes: Launch site to be used for suborbital and polar low-Earth orbital launch on the east coast by companies BluShift Aerospace and VALT Enterprises and funded by Maine Space Grant Consortium.

properties.name: Woomera Test Range, SA
properties.notes: Australian government research facility. Missile testing, 2 satellite launches.

properties.name: Lancelin, WA
properties.notes: During a total solar eclipse

properties.name: Koonibba Test Range, SA
properties.notes: Used by Southern Launch for suborbital launch tests

properties.name: Whalers Way Orbital Launch Complex, SA
properties.notes: Used by Southern Launch for orbital polar launches

properties.name: Arnhem Space Centre, NT
properties.notes: First NASA launches outside USA. Australia's first commercial launches

properties.name: Reagan Test Site, Omelek Island, Kwajalein Atoll
properties.notes: US-controlled ICBM base converted for satellites. SpaceX Falcon 1. Close to the equator.

properties.name: Birdling's Flat
properties.notes: Used for sounding rockets. Formerly proposed launch site for Rocket Lab, never developed.

properties.name: Great Mercury Island
properties.notes: Used for the first launch by Rocket Lab of their Atea 1 suborbital rocket.

properties.name: Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1, Mahia Peninsula
properties.notes: Launch site built and operated by Rocket Lab. First commercial spaceport in the southern hemisphere.

properties.name: MLP Sputnik
properties.notes: Mobile satellite launch platform operated by Copenhagen Suborbitals.

properties.notes: Launch pad for Tronador II under construction (CONAE)

properties.name: Guiana Space Centre, Kourou
properties.notes: Operated by CNES for ESA; launch base for Arianespace. Commercial and governmental launches.

properties.notes: Sounding rocket launch location.
